name: digigun.formats.hx
description: Pure-Haxe, cross-platform readers and writers for config, data, and texture formats.
releasenote: Text formats live under digigun.formats.text.<format>, EditorConfig is supported as a thin INI specialization, and the image branch covers DDS, KTX, PVR, BMP, TIFF, TGA, PPM/PGM, RAW, and simple TGA RLE.
